problem: MX flight required to check R/H prop speed
action: Before flight, while taxiing there was a noticable higher RPM on Right Side Engine. Held full power on Run Up and both sides stabilized around 2400 RPM. Held full power before takeoff with same result. Immediately after liftoff, the right side engine oversped to 2750 and slightly reduced to 2730 for a few seconds before the annuciator sounded. Reduced power to climb setting and RPM returned to normal limitations. In level cruise flight I held full power at high RPM and both engines held a Stable 2680 RPM the entire time. did a second takeoff at TVF and the same issue with overspeed after liftoff occured until higher in the climb. No issues for the remainder of the flight. Palmer Timmons 4146376CFI
